title: EVERY PRESIDENT SINCE NIXON RELEASED THEM. EXCEPT ONE.
title_alt: 50 YEARS OF PRESIDENTIAL TAX RETURNS — ONE BREAK
TWO SUPREME COURT CASES. NEVER VOLUNTARILY RELEASED.
description:
Every president since Nixon released their tax returns. Until one didn't.

The 2015 trail promise: "I'll release them after the audit." The audit never ended. Two Supreme Court cases (Trump v. Vance, Trump v. Mazars, both 7-2). The 2020 New York Times story came from a leak — a leak is not a release. The book grades it BROKEN.

Full 145-promise audit: https://sealed2016.com?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=shorts&utm_campaign=tax-returns

#politics #trump #shorts #factcheck
